zh.lifeSummary: 當Warin de Trussell於1317年之前出生在英國瓦維其可爾比勒斯利時，他的父親William De Trussell56歲，母親Matilda Mainwaring37歲。他於1341年之前與Maud St Philbert結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1365年在英國爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Warin de Trussell于1317年之前出生在英国瓦維其可爾比勒斯利时，他的父亲William De Trussell56岁，母亲Matilda Mainwaring37岁。他于1341年之前与Maud St Philbert结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1365年在英国爾。

nameMeanings.name: Trussell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Middle English trus(s)el(le) ‘bundle, parcel’ (Old French troussel), perhaps for a porter (see Truss ), or from the same word in the sense ‘stamp, mould (for stamping coins)’, for someone who minted coins.
variant of Thrussell, a nickname from Middle English thros(t)el, thrus(t)el ‘song thrush’ (Old English thros(t)le). Compare Thrush .

variants.name: Truss
meanings: English (mainly Essex and Middlesex): metonymic occupational name from Middle English trusse ‘bundle, package’ (Old French trousse), perhaps for a porter. See also Trussell .
Americanized form of Ukrainian Trus: nickname from trus ‘rabbit’, typically applied to someone thought to be a coward.

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Warin de Trussell was born before 1317, in Billesley, Warwickshire, England, his father, William De Trussell, was 56 and his mother, Matilda Mainwaring, was 37. He married Maud St Philbert before 1341. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died about 1365, in Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Warin de Trussell est né avant 1317, à Billesley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William De Trussell, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Matilda Mainwaring, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Maud St Philbert avant 1341. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé environ 1365, à Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Warin de Trussell vor 1317 in Billesley, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Trussell 56 und seine Mutter Matilda Mainwaring 37. Er hat vor 1341 Maud St Philbert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1365 in Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Warin de Trussell è nato il prima del 1317 nel Billesley, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, William De Trussell, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Mainwaring, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Maud St Philbert prima del 1341. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1365, nel Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Warin de Trussellが1317年以前にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアビレスリーで生まれた時，父William De Trussellは56歳，母Matilda Mainwaringは37歳であった。1341年以前にMaud St Philbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は約1365年にイギリスチェシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Warin de Trussell(이)가 1317년 이전 영국 워윅실르 빌레슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Trussell(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Mainwaring(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1341년 이전 Maud St Philbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1365년 영국 체실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Warin de Trussell nasceu antes 1317, em Billesley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Trussell, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Mainwaring, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud St Philbert antes 1341. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1365, em Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Warin de Trussell родился перед 1317 г. в местности биллесли, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Trussell было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Mainwaring, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud St Philbert перед 1341 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер около 1365 г. в местности чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Warin de Trussell nació antes de 1317, en Billesley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William De Trussell, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Matilda Mainwaring, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Maud St Philbert antes de 1341. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1365, en Cheshire, Inglaterra.
